SEARCH
Package com.example.junimoapp

Class OrganizerUnitTest

java.lang.Object
com.example.junimoapp.OrganizerUnitTest
public class OrganizerUnitTest extends Object
Unit tests for Organizer functionality. Tests cover model and control logic for event creation and management. This class has inner classes used for testing, these classes run independtly: - Poster functions: US 02.04.01 and 02.04.02 - Geo location functions: US 02.02.02 and 02.02.03 - Updated public event: US 02.01.01 - Sampling size: US 02.05.02

    testAcceptCoOrganizerInviteLogic()
    tests that accepting a co-organizer invite adds user to accepted list

    US 02.06.02 Tests that cancelled entrants are stored correctly.

    tests that declining a co-organizer invite adds user to declined list

    US 02.01.01 Tests that addOrEditEvent() updates an existing event rather than adding a duplicate when the same eventID is used.
    void

    US 02.06.03 Tests that enrolled entrants are stored correctly.

    US 02.01.01 Tests that an Event stores its title and description correctly.

    US 02.01.01 Tests that two randomly generated event IDs are never equal.
    void

    US 02.01.04 Tests that an invalid registration period (start after end) is detected.

    US 02.06.01 Tests that invited entrants are stored correctly.
    void

    US 02.02.01 Tests that the entrants who joined the waiting list are stored correctly.
    void

    US 02.05.02 Tests that maxCapacity must be positive — can't sample 0 or fewer.
    void

    US 02.05.02 Tests that maxCapacity (number to sample) is stored correctly on Event.

    void
    testNoDuplicateCoOrganizers()
    tests that the same co-organizer is not added twice

    testQRCodeCanBeSetOnEvent()
    US 02.01.01 Tests that a QR code can be set and retrieved on an Event object.
    void
    testQRCodeFormatIsCorrect()
    US 02.01.01 Tests that the QR code string is built in the correct format.
    void

    US 02.01.04 Tests that start and end registration dates are stored correctly.

    US 02.05.02 Tests that the sample size cannot exceed the waiting list size.
    void

    testValidDateRangeStartBeforeEnd()

    void

    US 02.03.01 Tests that a waiting list limit is stored correctly when provided.
    void

  • Constructor Details

    • OrganizerUnitTest

      public OrganizerUnitTest()

  • Method Details

    • testEventCreationHasCorrectTitleAndDescription

      public void testEventCreationHasCorrectTitleAndDescription()
      US 02.01.01 Tests that an Event stores its title and description correctly. Simulates the basic event object creation from CreateEvent.java.

    • testQRCodeFormatIsCorrect

      public void testQRCodeFormatIsCorrect()
      US 02.01.01 Tests that the QR code string is built in the correct format. Mirrors the exact logic from the QRCodeButton click in CreateEvent.java: QRCodeString = "junimo://event?id=" + QREventID

    • testQRCodeCanBeSetOnEvent

      public void testQRCodeCanBeSetOnEvent()
      US 02.01.01 Tests that a QR code can be set and retrieved on an Event object. Mirrors event.setQRCode(QRCodeString) in CreateEvent.java.

    • testEventIDsAreUnique

      public void testEventIDsAreUnique()
      US 02.01.01 Tests that two randomly generated event IDs are never equal. In CreateEvent.java, UUID.randomUUID().toString() ensures uniqueness.

    • testAddEventAndSearchByID

      public void testAddEventAndSearchByID()
      US 02.01.01 Tests that EventData.addOrEditEvent() adds an event and it can be found by searchEventID().

    • testEditEventUpdatesInsteadOfDuplicating

      public void testEditEventUpdatesInsteadOfDuplicating()
      US 02.01.01 Tests that addOrEditEvent() updates an existing event rather than adding a duplicate when the same eventID is used. Mirrors the edit flow in CreateEvent.java where an existing event is passed in via intent and re-saved.

    • testRegistrationPeriodStoredCorrectly

      public void testRegistrationPeriodStoredCorrectly()
      US 02.01.04 Tests that start and end registration dates are stored correctly.

    • testValidDateRangeStartBeforeEnd

      public void testValidDateRangeStartBeforeEnd() throws Exception
      US 02.01.04 Tests the date validation logic from CreateEvent.java — a valid registration period has start before end.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • testInvalidDateRangeStartAfterEnd

      public void testInvalidDateRangeStartAfterEnd() throws Exception
      US 02.01.04 Tests that an invalid registration period (start after end) is detected. Mirrors the if (start.after(end)) check in CreateEvent.java that prevents the event from being published.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • testWaitingListLimitStoredWhenProvided

      public void testWaitingListLimitStoredWhenProvided()
      US 02.03.01 Tests that a waiting list limit is stored correctly when provided.

    • testWaitingListLimitZeroMeansNoLimit

      public void testWaitingListLimitZeroMeansNoLimit()
      US 02.03.01 Tests that waitingListLimit of 0 is treated as "no limit". In CreateEvent.java, if the field is left empty, no limit is applied. Since waitingListLimit is int (not Integer), 0 represents optional/unset.

    • testNegativeWaitingListLimitIsInvalid

      public void testNegativeWaitingListLimitIsInvalid()
      US 02.03.01 Tests that a negative waiting list limit is invalid. Mirrors the validation in CreateEvent.java: if (waitingListLimit != null invalid input: '&'invalid input: '&' waitingListLimit invalid input: '<' 0) show error

    • testMaxCapacityStoredCorrectly

      public void testMaxCapacityStoredCorrectly()
      US 02.05.02 Tests that maxCapacity (number to sample) is stored correctly on Event.

    • testMaxCapacityMustBePositive

      public void testMaxCapacityMustBePositive()
      US 02.05.02 Tests that maxCapacity must be positive — can't sample 0 or fewer.

    • testSampleSizeCannotExceedWaitingListSize

      public void testSampleSizeCannotExceedWaitingListSize()
      US 02.05.02 Tests that the sample size cannot exceed the waiting list size. If only 10 people joined the waiting list, you can't sample 20.

    • testSampleSizeEqualToWaitingListIsValid

      public void testSampleSizeEqualToWaitingListIsValid()
      US 02.05.02 Tests that a sample size equal to the waiting list size is valid. Edge case — selecting everyone on the list is allowed.

    • TestInvitedEntrants

      public void TestInvitedEntrants()
      US 02.06.01 Tests that invited entrants are stored correctly.

    • TestCancelledEntrants

      public void TestCancelledEntrants()
      US 02.06.02 Tests that cancelled entrants are stored correctly.

    • TestEnrolledEntrants

      public void TestEnrolledEntrants()
      US 02.06.03 Tests that enrolled entrants are stored correctly.

    • TestJoinedWaitingList

      public void TestJoinedWaitingList()
      US 02.02.01 Tests that the entrants who joined the waiting list are stored correctly.

    • testCoOrganizerInviteParsing

      public void testCoOrganizerInviteParsing()
      tests that co-organizer invites are stored and parsed correctly

    • testAcceptCoOrganizerInviteLogic

      public void testAcceptCoOrganizerInviteLogic()
      tests that accepting a co-organizer invite adds user to accepted list

    • testDeclineCoOrganizerInviteLogic

      public void testDeclineCoOrganizerInviteLogic()
      tests that declining a co-organizer invite adds user to declined list

    • testCoOrganizerInviteRemovedAfterAction

      public void testCoOrganizerInviteRemovedAfterAction()
      tests that a co-organizer invite is removed after action

    • testNoDuplicateCoOrganizers

      public void testNoDuplicateCoOrganizers()
      tests that the same co-organizer is not added twice
